description_long: This is a tall, slender stone obelisk mounted on a multi-tiered square base, reminiscent of war memorials or commemorative monuments found in urban parks or plazas. The obelisk rises vertically from a robust pedestal, which is inscribed with text panels on all visible sides. The base consists of several stepped platforms, with the lowest tier being the broadest and the upper tiers narrowing as they ascend. One side of the base features a short, angular stone wall or bench, providing a slight asymmetry to the otherwise symmetrical structure. The entire monument is constructed from light gray stone, giving it a solemn and dignified appearance, and the surfaces appear weathered but well-maintained.
description: A tall, gray stone obelisk with inscribed panels, set atop a stepped square base with a short side wall, resembling a commemorative monument.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscribed panel and the symmetrical stepped base, with the short side wall visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular stone wall extending from the base and the layered steps leading up to the obelisk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional inscription panels and the full width of the stepped base, with the side wall now on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the main inscription and the angular wall, with the monument's text clearly visible.
attribute_inscription: Multiple engraved panels with text are visible on all four sides of the pedestal, in a serif typeface, likely in English. The inscriptions are legible and appear to list names or commemorative information.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible; the monument is plain with no decorative carvings or motifs beyond the inscriptions.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, square platform with three main steps, constructed from the same light gray stone as the obelisk. One side features a short, angular stone wall or bench, adding a functional and visual element.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is a simple, pointed pyramid shape with no additional decoration or embellishment.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a paved platform that extends outward from the base, with no visible vegetation, statues, or fencing.
